description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named linux-wheel-builder that runs on pull requests, pushes, and daily on a schedule. The workflow should set up an ubuntu-latest environment with read permissions to repository contents, using bash as the shell. It should have two jobs: one to build and test Python wheels on Linux, and another to build CPack. Both jobs should check out submodules, provision a micromamba environment, and then execute specific bash scripts for building and testing.
